requirement_topic.en: Conformity Assessment & Import Inspection — CACEA / Ministry of Trade (Ethiopia)
requirement_topic.zh: 合格评定与进口检验——CACEA/贸易部（埃塞俄比亚）
requirement_topic.zht: 合格評定與進口檢驗——CACEA/貿易部（衣索比亞）

summary.en: Unlike the EU's single self-declared CE marking, Ethiopia controls market access for regulated/imported products such as household refrigerators through a conformity-assessment and import-inspection regime. Standards are set by the Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) (largely by adoption of IEC/ISO standards as ES), while conformity assessment, certification and import inspection are handled by CACEA (the conformity-assessment/certification authority) together with the Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration. For regulated goods, conformity is typically demonstrated through documentary review and/or inspection against the applicable ES (e.g., ES IEC 60335-2-24 for safety, ES IEC 62552 for energy) — often as pre-shipment inspection at origin and/or destination inspection on arrival. The in-country importer is the operator that lodges the import documentation and arranges the inspection. The most portable supporting evidence is an IECEE CB Scheme test report/certificate to the relevant IEC standard, plus the manufacturer's product test reports and a declaration. There is no manufacturer self-affixed CE-style mark that substitutes for this inspection step.
summary.zh: 与欧盟单一自我声明的CE标志不同，埃塞俄比亚通过合格评定与进口检验制度管控家用电冰箱等受监管/进口产品的市场准入。标准由埃塞俄比亚标准局（ESA）制定（主要通过采纳IEC/ISO标准为ES），而合格评定、认证与进口检验由CACEA（合格评定/认证主管机构）连同贸易与区域一体化部办理。对于受监管货物，符合性通常通过对照适用ES（如安全的ES IEC 60335-2-24、能效的ES IEC 62552）的文件审查和/或检验来证明——常为原产地装运前检验和/或到货目的地检验。在地进口商为提交进口文件并安排检验的运营商。最具可移植性的支持证据为符合相关IEC标准的IECEE CB体系检测报告/证书，加上制造商的产品检测报告及声明。不存在可替代此检验环节的制造商自贴CE式标志。
summary.zht: 與歐盟單一自我聲明的CE標誌不同，衣索比亞通過合格評定與進口檢驗制度管控家用電冰箱等受監管/進口產品的市場准入。標準由衣索比亞標準局（ESA）制定（主要通過採納IEC/ISO標準為ES），而合格評定、認證與進口檢驗由CACEA（合格評定/認證主管機構）連同貿易與區域一體化部辦理。對於受監管貨物，符合性通常通過對照適用ES（如安全的ES IEC 60335-2-24、能效的ES IEC 62552）的文件審查和/或檢驗來證明——常為原產地裝運前檢驗和/或到貨目的地檢驗。在地進口商為提交進口文件並安排檢驗的運營商。最具可移植性的支持證據為符合相關IEC標準的IECEE CB體系檢測報告/證書，加上製造商的產品檢測報告及聲明。不存在可替代此檢驗環節的製造商自貼CE式標誌。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) — adopts IEC/ISO standards as Ethiopian Standards (ES)
CACEA — conformity assessment, certification and inspection authority
Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration — import inspection / market-access control for regulated products
Applicable ES standards for refrigerators — ES IEC 60335-2-24 (safety), ES IEC 62552 (energy test methods)
IECEE CB Scheme test report/certificate — most portable supporting conformity evidence

summary.en: In China, household refrigerating appliances require China Compulsory Certification (CCC) covering safety (GB 4706.13) and EMC (GB 4343.1) before domestic sale, plus the China Energy Label (GB 12021.2) administered by NDRC/SAMR. CCC is a mandatory third-party certification by CNCA-designated certification bodies (CABs), resulting in a CCC mark on the product — it is a domestic-market mechanism. The CCC mark, CNCA certificate and CNAS test reports are issued for the Chinese market and are not automatically recognised by Ethiopia's CACEA/import-inspection regime; however, because the underlying GB standards derive from the same IEC base standards Ethiopia adopts, the manufacturer's IEC-referenced test data (especially via an IECEE CB Scheme report) can support the Ethiopian conformity/inspection file.
summary.zh: 在中国，家用制冷器具在国内销售前须取得涵盖安全（GB 4706.13）和电磁兼容（GB 4343.1）的中国强制认证（CCC），并须有由NDRC/SAMR管理的中国能效标识（GB 12021.2）。CCC为由CNCA指定认证机构（CAB）实施的强制性第三方认证，在产品上形成CCC标志——属国内市场机制。CCC标志、CNCA证书及CNAS检测报告系为中国市场颁发，不被埃塞俄比亚CACEA/进口检验制度自动承认；但由于底层GB标准源自埃塞所采纳的同一IEC基础标准，制造商引用IEC的检测数据（尤其通过IECEE CB体系报告）可支持埃塞符合性/检验文件。
summary.zht: 在中國，家用製冷器具在國內銷售前須取得涵蓋安全（GB 4706.13）和電磁相容（GB 4343.1）的中國強制認證（CCC），並須有由NDRC/SAMR管理的中國能效標識（GB 12021.2）。CCC為由CNCA指定認證機構（CAB）實施的強制性第三方認證，在產品上形成CCC標誌——屬國內市場機制。CCC標誌、CNCA證書及CNAS檢測報告係為中國市場頒發，不被衣索比亞CACEA/進口檢驗制度自動承認；但由於底層GB標準源自衣索所採納的同一IEC基礎標準，製造商引用IEC的檢測數據（尤其通過IECEE CB體系報告）可支持衣索符合性/檢驗文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — safety (GB 4706.13) + EMC (GB 4343.1); mandatory; administered by CNCA/SAMR
China Energy Label — Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR); based on GB 12021.2-2015

gap.en: Chinese manufacturers must build an Ethiopian conformity/inspection package rather than rely on the CCC mark: (1) Conformity route differs — instead of a self-affixed CE mark or the domestic CCC mark, Ethiopia uses CACEA/Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection (potentially pre-shipment and/or destination), arranged by the in-country importer. (2) Evidence portability — an IECEE CB Scheme test report/certificate to ES-adopted IEC standards (IEC 60335-2-24, IEC 60335-1, and IEC 62552 for energy) is the strongest documentation; CCC-only reports referencing GB national deviations may need supplementing with IEC-referenced reports. (3) Importer-led documentation — the importer lodges the import file; the exporter should supply test reports, a declaration of conformity to the relevant ES/IEC standards, product marking, and instructions. (4) Confirm scope — whether refrigerators are on Ethiopia's regulated/inspected products list, the exact inspection type (pre-shipment vs destination), and any fees should be confirmed with the importer/CACEA before shipment via Djibouti.
gap.zh: 中国制造商须建立埃塞符合性/检验文件包，而非依赖CCC标志：（1）符合性路径不同——埃塞使用CACEA/贸易部合格评定与进口检验（可能为装运前和/或目的地），由在地进口商安排，而非自贴CE标志或国内CCC标志。（2）证据可移植性——符合采纳为ES的IEC标准（IEC 60335-2-24、IEC 60335-1，以及能效的IEC 62552）的IECEE CB体系检测报告/证书为最强文件；仅有引用GB国家偏差的CCC报告可能需以引用IEC的报告补充。（3）进口商主导文件——由进口商提交进口文件；出口商应提供检测报告、对相关ES/IEC标准的符合性声明、产品标识及说明书。（4）确认范围——电冰箱是否在埃塞受监管/受检产品清单上、确切检验类型（装运前 vs 目的地）及任何费用，应在经吉布提出货前向进口商/CACEA确认。
gap.zht: 中國製造商須建立衣索符合性/檢驗文件包，而非依賴CCC標誌：（1）符合性路徑不同——衣索使用CACEA/貿易部合格評定與進口檢驗（可能為裝運前和/或目的地），由在地進口商安排，而非自貼CE標誌或國內CCC標誌。（2）證據可移植性——符合採納為ES的IEC標準（IEC 60335-2-24、IEC 60335-1，以及能效的IEC 62552）的IECEE CB體系檢測報告/證書為最強文件；僅有引用GB國家偏差的CCC報告可能需以引用IEC的報告補充。（3）進口商主導文件——由進口商提交進口文件；出口商應提供檢測報告、對相關ES/IEC標準的符合性聲明、產品標識及說明書。（4）確認範圍——電冰箱是否在衣索受監管/受檢產品清單上、確切檢驗類型（裝運前 vs 目的地）及任何費用，應在經吉布提出貨前向進口商/CACEA確認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for import of regulated products — conformity assessment and import inspection by CACEA/Ministry of Trade (against ES-adopted IEC standards) are required for market access, arranged via the in-country importer; confirm refrigerator scope and inspection type
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC certification (safety + EMC) + China Energy Label display required before sale in China

source.publisher: Ethiopian Standards Agency (ESA) adopts IEC standards as ES; CACEA / Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration operate conformity assessment and import inspection

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ethiopia controls refrigerator market access through CACEA/Ministry of Trade conformity assessment and import inspection against ES-adopted IEC standards, not an EU-style self-affixed CE mark or the Chinese CCC mark. Chinese exporters should provide IEC-referenced test reports (ideally an IECEE CB Scheme report to IEC 60335-2-24 / 60335-1 / 62552) and a declaration through the in-country importer, and confirm the exact inspection type and regulated-product scope with the importer/CACEA before shipping via Djibouti.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 埃塞俄比亚通过CACEA/贸易部对照采纳为ES的IEC标准进行合格评定与进口检验来管控电冰箱市场准入，而非欧盟式自贴CE标志或中国CCC标志。中国出口商应通过在地进口商提供引用IEC的检测报告（理想为符合IEC 60335-2-24/60335-1/62552的IECEE CB体系报告）及声明，并在经吉布提出货前向进口商/CACEA确认确切检验类型及受监管产品范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 衣索比亞通過CACEA/貿易部對照採納為ES的IEC標準進行合格評定與進口檢驗來管控電冰箱市場准入，而非歐盟式自貼CE標誌或中國CCC標誌。中國出口商應通過在地進口商提供引用IEC的檢測報告（理想為符合IEC 60335-2-24/60335-1/62552的IECEE CB體系報告）及聲明，並在經吉布提出貨前向進口商/CACEA確認確切檢驗類型及受監管產品範圍。

requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer & Logistics via Djibouti — Responsible Operator for the Ethiopian Market
requirement_topic.zh: 在地进口商与经吉布提物流——埃塞俄比亚市场的责任运营商
requirement_topic.zht: 在地進口商與經吉布提物流——衣索比亞市場的責任運營商

summary.en: Ethiopia is landlocked, so imports overwhelmingly transit through the Port of Djibouti and then move overland to Addis Ababa and inland markets. Market access in practice requires an in-country importer (a licensed Ethiopian importing entity) who: holds the import permit/licence, lodges the customs and import-inspection documentation with the Ministry of Trade/CACEA, arranges any pre-shipment or destination conformity inspection, manages foreign-exchange/letter-of-credit formalities (Ethiopia has historically had strict FX controls), and is the responsible party for the product on the Ethiopian market. Unlike the EU's statutory 'Authorised Representative' obligation under Regulation (EU) 2019/1020, Ethiopia does not impose an EU-style mandated AR construct on the foreign manufacturer — instead the licensed in-country importer is the operative responsible economic operator. Exporters should appoint a reliable importer early, because that party drives conformity, inspection, FX, and Djibouti-corridor logistics.
summary.zh: 埃塞俄比亚为内陆国，进口绝大多数经吉布提港中转，再陆运至亚的斯亚贝巴及内陆市场。实务上的市场准入需要在地进口商（持牌的埃塞进口实体），其负责：持有进口许可/牌照、向贸易部/CACEA提交海关与进口检验文件、安排任何装运前或目的地符合性检验、办理外汇/信用证手续（埃塞历来外汇管制严格），并作为产品在埃塞市场的责任方。与欧盟法规（EU）2019/1020下法定的"授权代表"义务不同，埃塞不对外国制造商施加欧盟式强制AR架构——而是由持牌在地进口商作为实际生效的责任经济运营商。出口商应尽早委任可靠进口商，因为该方主导符合性、检验、外汇及吉布提走廊物流。
summary.zht: 衣索比亞為內陸國，進口絕大多數經吉布提港中轉，再陸運至阿迪斯阿貝巴及內陸市場。實務上的市場准入需要在地進口商（持牌的衣索進口實體），其負責：持有進口許可/牌照、向貿易部/CACEA提交海關與進口檢驗文件、安排任何裝運前或目的地符合性檢驗、辦理外匯/信用證手續（衣索歷來外匯管制嚴格），並作為產品在衣索市場的責任方。與歐盟法規（EU）2019/1020下法定的「授權代表」義務不同，衣索不對外國製造商施加歐盟式強制AR架構——而是由持牌在地進口商作為實際生效的責任經濟運營商。出口商應盡早委任可靠進口商，因為該方主導符合性、檢驗、外匯及吉布提走廊物流。

standards_or_laws: Ethiopia import-licensing regime — licensed in-country importer required (Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration)
Port of Djibouti / Ethiopia-Djibouti corridor — primary import route for landlocked Ethiopia
Ethiopian foreign-exchange / import-permit and letter-of-credit formalities (confirm current rules with importer/bank)
No EU-style statutory Authorised Representative obligation imposed on the foreign manufacturer — the licensed importer is the responsible operator

summary.en: China has no direct regulatory equivalent requiring an export-bound manufacturer to designate a destination-country resident legal representative for product compliance — Chinese exporters appoint overseas distributors/importers commercially. Under the domestic CCC regime the certification holder is the responsible party for the Chinese market; that role neither extends to nor satisfies Ethiopian import/market-access requirements. The practical analogue for the manufacturer is simply selecting a competent Ethiopian importer and handling export logistics; there is no Chinese statutory construct that maps onto Ethiopia's importer-led, Djibouti-routed, FX-controlled import model.
summary.zh: 中国没有直接的监管等同规定，要求出口制造商为产品合规指定目的国境内居住的法定代表人——中国出口商以商业方式委任海外经销商/进口商。在国内CCC制度下，认证持有人为中国市场的责任方；该角色既不延伸至也不满足埃塞进口/市场准入要求。对制造商而言，实务对应物即为选择有能力的埃塞进口商并处理出口物流；不存在与埃塞由进口商主导、经吉布提路由、受外汇管制的进口模式相对应的中国法定架构。
summary.zht: 中國沒有直接的監管等同規定，要求出口製造商為產品合規指定目的國境內居住的法定代表人——中國出口商以商業方式委任海外經銷商/進口商。在國內CCC制度下，認證持有人為中國市場的責任方；該角色既不延伸至也不滿足衣索進口/市場准入要求。對製造商而言，實務對應物即為選擇有能力的衣索進口商並處理出口物流；不存在與衣索由進口商主導、經吉布提路由、受外匯管制的進口模式相對應的中國法定架構。

standards_or_laws: N/A — no direct Chinese regulatory equivalent; Chinese exporters appoint overseas importers/distributors commercially

gap.en: This is a structural/commercial gap rather than a technical standards gap, but it is decisive for actually getting product into Ethiopia: (1) Importer dependency — without a licensed in-country importer, the goods cannot clear customs/import inspection; the importer (not the Chinese manufacturer) is the responsible operator and the practical gatekeeper. (2) FX and permits — Ethiopia's foreign-exchange controls and import-permit/letter-of-credit requirements can delay or block shipments; the importer manages these and the exporter should align payment terms accordingly. (3) Djibouti corridor — landlocked logistics add transit time, demurrage risk, and inland-transport cost from Djibouti to Addis Ababa; documentation must support the Djibouti transit and Ethiopian clearance. (4) No EU-AR analogue — exporters do not need to appoint an EU-style Authorised Representative, but they DO need a capable importer who can carry the conformity/inspection and FX burden. Confirm the importer's licence status, FX capacity, and corridor logistics before contracting.
gap.zh: 这是结构性/商业性差距而非技术标准差距，但对实际将产品送入埃塞起决定作用：（1）进口商依赖——无持牌在地进口商，货物无法清关/通过进口检验；进口商（而非中国制造商）为责任运营商及实际守门人。（2）外汇与许可——埃塞外汇管制及进口许可/信用证要求可能延误或阻碍发货；进口商负责处理，出口商应据此协调付款条件。（3）吉布提走廊——内陆物流增加运输时间、滞期风险及从吉布提至亚的斯亚贝巴的内陆运输成本；文件须支持吉布提中转及埃塞清关。（4）无EU-AR对应物——出口商无需委任欧盟式授权代表，但确实需要有能力承担符合性/检验及外汇负担的进口商。请在签约前确认进口商的牌照状态、外汇能力及走廊物流。
gap.zht: 這是結構性/商業性差距而非技術標準差距，但對實際將產品送入衣索起決定作用：（1）進口商依賴——無持牌在地進口商，貨物無法清關/通過進口檢驗；進口商（而非中國製造商）為責任運營商及實際守門人。（2）外匯與許可——衣索外匯管制及進口許可/信用證要求可能延誤或阻礙發貨；進口商負責處理，出口商應據此協調付款條件。（3）吉布提走廊——內陸物流增加運輸時間、滯期風險及從吉布提至阿迪斯阿貝巴的內陸運輸成本；文件須支持吉布提中轉及衣索清關。（4）無EU-AR對應物——出口商無需委任歐盟式授權代表，但確實需要有能力承擔符合性/檢驗及外匯負擔的進口商。請在簽約前確認進口商的牌照狀態、外匯能力及走廊物流。

mandatory_status.target: Effectively mandatory in practice — a licensed in-country importer is required to clear customs/import inspection and is the responsible operator; no EU-style statutory Authorised Representative is imposed on the foreign manufacturer. Confirm importer licence, FX capacity, and Djibouti-corridor logistics
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent requirement — Chinese export manufacturers have no statutory obligation to appoint a destination-country responsible representative under Chinese law

source.publisher: Ethiopia Ministry of Trade and Regional Integration (import licensing) / Port of Djibouti corridor — informational; confirm current import-permit and FX rules with the in-country importer

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Reaching the Ethiopian market in practice requires a licensed in-country importer who clears customs, lodges import inspection with CACEA/Ministry of Trade, manages FX/import permits, and routes goods through the Port of Djibouti to Addis Ababa. Ethiopia imposes no EU-style mandated Authorised Representative on the foreign manufacturer — but the capable importer is the de facto responsible operator and gatekeeper. Confirm the importer's licence, FX capacity, and corridor logistics before contracting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 实务上进入埃塞俄比亚市场需要持牌在地进口商，其负责清关、向CACEA/贸易部提交进口检验、办理外汇/进口许可，并经吉布提港将货物运至亚的斯亚贝巴。埃塞不对外国制造商施加欧盟式强制授权代表——但有能力的进口商是事实上的责任运营商与守门人。请在签约前确认进口商的牌照、外汇能力及走廊物流。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 實務上進入衣索比亞市場需要持牌在地進口商，其負責清關、向CACEA/貿易部提交進口檢驗、辦理外匯/進口許可，並經吉布提港將貨物運至阿迪斯阿貝巴。衣索不對外國製造商施加歐盟式強制授權代表——但有能力的進口商是事實上的責任運營商與守門人。請在簽約前確認進口商的牌照、外匯能力及走廊物流。
